column1: # Tab-separated symbol file for the Teufel Cinebar One STM32F072 firmware.
# Types: FUNC, LABEL (code), DATA (RAM/flash struct), PERIPH (MMIO region)
# Use with Ghidra: open Script Manager → run the companion ghidra_load_symbols.py
# Or for other tools (IDA, Binary Ninja, custom scripts): parse this file directly.

column4: Infinite-loop trap; all unused IRQ vectors point here
Only application IRQ wired to a real handler
Wrapper — used by all 8 event-loop posters
strb r0,#3 → state[0] (intermediate during active entry)
strb r0,#4 → state[0] (intermediate during standby entry)
bl GPIO_WriteBit(GPIOF, 0x0001, 0) — DSP reset asserted (standby path)
bl GPIO_WriteBit(GPIOC, 0x8000, 0) — audio rail OFF. NOP'd in firmware_06
Main UI/event RTX thread; entry passed to osThreadNew at app_main init
bl 0x08011524 — runs when queue times out (auto-standby decision)
bl 0x0800ABE4 — posts type-7 event (intermediate auto-standby step)
bl notify(0, retval) — the broadcast Goal #1 needed
int notify(uint8_t channel, uint32_t value) — alloc msg pool, fill {channel, value}, post via osMessageQueuePut
uint8_t auto_standby_check(void) — checks audio activity vs elapsed time, returns 2 when sustained mode==1 (silent) > 1000 ticks
uint32_t GPIO_ReadPins(GPIO_TypeDef *port, uint32_t pin_mask) — used by is_audio_active
void GPIO_WriteBit(GPIO_TypeDef *port, uint32_t pin_mask, uint32_t value); used by transition_state
void vEEPROM_set_default(uint16_t key, uint16_t value) — set if not already persisted

column1: # === Event-loop posters (post {byte[0]=type, byte[4]=action} to event_loop queue) ===

column4: Posts {byte[0]=0, byte[4]=action}; 15 callers — THIS is how IR-toggle reaches event_loop
RTX timer callback for LED animation
Initializes g_system_state + creates RTX queues + spawns event_loop_thread
MOVS R1, #1 — sets state[0]=1 (standby) at boot
NVIC enable for EXTI0_1, EXTI2_3, EXTI4_15
Called from transition_state after state[0] write
Called near end of transition_state path 1
22-byte shim: orig init 2 + transition_state(2) + notify(0, retval)
2 KB vEEPROM emulation page 1 (active in baseline dump)
ASCII strings for named RTX objects
RTX5 kernel state struct; [+8]=kernel state byte, [+12]=tick count
Used by auto_standby_check; [+0]=last decision, [+1]=last mode, [+8]=last change tick
Holds notify's queue handle at [+12], mem pool at [+16]
